modules.title: Introduction to Instrumentation Systems
topics: Functional elements of a measurement system

modules.title: Dynamic Characteristics of Instruments
topics: First and second order system compensation

modules.title: Measurement Techniques – Temperature, Pressure, Flow
topics: Temperature measurements (thermometry based on thermal expansion, liquid in glass, bimetallic, electric resistance- thermometry, thermocouples, thermistors, detectors)
Pressure and velocity measurements (barometer, manometer, dead weight tester, pressure gauges and transducers, dynamic measurements)
Flow measurements (pressure differential meters, orifice meter, venturi meter, rota-meter)

modules.title: Strain, Motion and Torque Measurements
topics: Strain gauges, strain and stress measurements, electrical circuits, compensations

Motion force and torque measurements, displacement measurements, potentiometers, linear and rotary variable differential transformers, velocity measurements, electromagnetic technique, stroboscope, load cell, measurement of torque on rotating shaft, power estimation from rotating shaft

modules.title: Control Systems
topics: Open loop and close loop control
Mathematical modeling of dynamic systems – mechanical systems
Block diagrams of close loop systems

reference_books: [1] Nakra B.C.Chaudhary K.K, Instrumentation measurement and analysisTata McGraw Hill, ISBN 0 07 451791 0
[2] Richard S, Figiola & Donal E. Beasley, John Wiley, Theory and design of mechanical measurements.

modules.title: Introduction and Kinematics
topics: Introduction to kinematics and kinetics of machines
Degree of freedom and types of motion
Kinematic concepts of links and joints
Overview of various mechanisms and applications

modules.title: Synthesis and Dynamics
topics: Dynamic motion analysis of mechanisms and machines
Relationship between kinematic and dynamic quantities
Analytical and graphical methods for mechanism analysis

modules.title: Cams and Followers
topics: Analytical cam design with specific contours
Pressure angle, radius and undercutting considerations
Critical‑path motion and torque on cam shaft

modules.title: Power Transmission
topics: Power screws, plate and cone clutches
Brake classifications: block, band, internal, external
Friction circle and friction axis concepts

modules.title: Gears and Vibration
topics: Types of gears: spur, bevel, worm, helical, hypoid
Gear trains and epicyclic gear sets
Static and dynamic balancing of gears
Introduction to vibration and single‑degree‑of‑freedom systems

reference_books: R. L. Norton, *Kinematics & Dynamics of Machinery*, Tata McGraw‑Hill, ISBN‑13: 978‑0‑07‑014480‑4
A. Ghosh & A. Malik, *Theory of Mechanisms and Machines*, EWP Pvt Ltd, ISBN: 81‑85095‑72‑8

modules.title: Introduction to Fluid Mechanics
topics: Fluid properties, surface tension, bulk modulus and thermodynamic properties
Newton’s laws of viscosity and its coefficients
Metacentric height and stability of floating bodies

modules.title: Fluid Kinematics
topics: Description of fluid flow, stream line, path line and streak line
Types of flow and types of motion
Potential flow, circulation, velocity potential, stream function

modules.title: Fluid Dynamics
topics: Momentum and moment of momentum equations and their applications
Forces on immersed bodies, lift and drag
Streamlined and bluff bodies, flow around circular cylinder and aerofoils

modules.title: Flow Through Pipes
topics: Reynolds number, laminar and turbulent flow
Viscous flow through parallel plates and pipes
Head loss in turbulent flow (Darcy’s equation)
Hydraulic and energy gradient, pipe networks

modules.title: Boundary Layer and Compressible Flow
topics: Boundary layer parameters, Von Kármán momentum equation
Compressible flow, Mach number, isentropic flow
Stagnation properties, normal and oblique shocks
Fanno and Rayleigh lines, flow through nozzles

reference_books: Massy B.S., Mechanics of Fluid, Routledge Publication
Shames, Fluid Mechanics, Tata McGraw Hill

modules.title: Analysis of Machining Processes
topics: Super‑finishing processes such as honing, lapping, electro‑polishing and buffing

modules.title: Gear Machining
topics: Principles of generation of surfaces – hobbing, shaping and basic rack cutting
Gear finishing by shaving and gear grinding

modules.title: Plastics
topics: Moulding methods – injection moulding, compression moulding, transfer moulding, extrusion moulding, calendaring, blow moulding

modules.title: Unconventional Machining Processes
topics: Non‑destructive testing of machined surfaces and tools

modules.title: Extrusion and Numerical Control
topics: Sawing operations – power hacksaw, band saw, circular saw
Coordinate systems used in NC machining

reference_books: Ghosh A., Mallik A.K., Manufacturing Science, EWP Pvt Ltd, ISBN 81 85095 85 X
R.K. Jain, Production Technology, Khanna Publishes, ISBN 81 7409 099 1
Campbell J.S., Principles of Manufacturing Materials and Processes.
Rao P.N., Manufacturing Technology, Tata McGraw Hill

modules.title: Role of computers in design and manufacture
topics: Role of computers in design and manufacture
Drawing software, configuration, function and facilities

modules.title: Surface modeling, curves and surface representation
topics: Curves and surface representation – composite surfaces
Parametric representation of analytic and synthetic curves

modules.title: Strategic plan of CAD system design and development
topics: Strategic plan of CAD system design and development

reference_books: Donald H, Paulin M, Computer graphics, Prentice Hall
Ibrahim Z., CAD/CAM, Theory and Practice, McGraw Hill
McMohan C, Browne, CAD/CAM Principles - practice and manufacturing management, Pearson Education Asia Ltd
